name: worldcup-ticket-prices
title: FIFA World Cup Final Ticket Prices per Edition (1994–2026)
description: Most expensive (Category-1) World Cup FINAL ticket, face value, nominal USD, one row per edition 1994–2026, plus the 2026 price tiers. THIN dataset: 1998 & 2006 have no reliable primary face-value source (blank, not interpolated); the 2014 figure is disputed (likely resale, flagged). Prices are nominal (not inflation-adjusted).

licenses.name: other-at
licenses.title: Factual figures compiled from FIFA announcements + reporting; NY/NJ AG release is public domain. Reuse with attribution.

sources.title: SI.com — 2026 vs historical World Cup final prices (cites Statista + FIFA)
NY/NJ Attorneys General — subpoena of FIFA over ticket pricing (27 May 2026)

fields.name: cat1_final_usd_nominal
fields.description: Most expensive (Category-1) final ticket, face value, nominal USD. Blank where no reliable primary exists (1998, 2006).

fields.name: status
fields.description: Data-quality flag: face_value | face_value_approx | face_value_phase4_cat1 | DISPUTED_likely_resale | missing

fields.name: kind
fields.description: Face value vs resale, and notes

resources.name: figure
resources.title: Hero chart
resources.description: Headline visualization for the data story.

resources.name: story
resources.title: Data story
resources.description: Narrative write-up of the insight, with caveats and provenance.

views.name: final-ticket-price-over-time
views.title: Most Expensive World Cup Final Ticket, Face Value (1994–2026)
views.description: Category-1 final ticket, face value, nominal USD, one point per edition. 1998 and 2006 are absent (no reliable primary source — left blank, NOT interpolated, so the line gaps there); 2014 is flagged DISPUTED in the `status` column (likely a resale figure, not face value). Prices are nominal — not inflation-adjusted. The 2026 jump to $10,990 is the headline.

views.name: ticket-2026-tiers
views.title: 2026 World Cup Final — Price by Tier
views.description: 2026 final ticket prices in USD. Face-value tiers run from the $60 supporter-entry floor to the $10,990 Category-1 ticket; the $32,970 'resale peak' is secondary-market / dynamic pricing — NOT face value (see the `kind` column). Bars sorted by price.
